sessionHistory.summary: Initial session: Set up session management protocol with model selection, goal tracking, and LanceDB memory persistence.

Daily Judge Swarm ran at 5:48 AM UTC. Spawned 17 Judge Agents (all repos with composite >4.0) + 1 cleanup agent. Score changes: invesco-retention 8.2→9.2 (NEW #1), signal-studio-templates 5.8→7.9, cor

6:13 AM cron re-trigger (duplicate fire, 25min after 5:48 AM run). Detected duplicate — did NOT re-spawn the 9 still-running agents. Diagnosed 6 failed agents from first run (all had negative runtimeM

6:30 AM — THIRD cron fire in 42 minutes (5:48, 6:13, 6:30). Detected as duplicate, skipped re-spawning. Current state: 9 original agents still running (40-42min), 6 retries all done (2-3min each), 2 o

8:39 AM cron fire (4th today, first clean run since swarm was clear). Previous morning swarm fully complete. Spawned fresh 17 judge agents (900s timeout) + cleanup for all repos with composite >4.0. S
